CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String);
SELECT visibleWidth(value) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT visibleWidth(CONCAT(value, ' !')) AS width_of_concat FROM test_table;
SELECT id, visibleWidth(value) AS width FROM test_table ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS non_null_count, SUM(visibleWidth(value)) AS total_width FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT x.id, visibleWidth(x.value) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table) AS x;
CREATE TABLE another_table (text String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY text;
SELECT visibleWidth(text) AS width_of_text FROM another_table WHERE text IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT visibleWidth(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id > 0) AS subquery;
SELECT visibleWidth('Sample text') + visibleWidth(NULL) AS combined_width;
WITH NULL AS null_value, 'Example' AS test_string SELECT visibleWidth(null_value) AS width_of_null, visibleWidth(test_string) AS width_of_example;
SELECT t1.id, visibleWidth(t1.value) FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.text IS NOT NULL;
